zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland於1430年1月1日出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利時，他的父親Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly20歲，母親Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly19歲。他於1455年5月20日與Elizabeth Dunbar 8th Countess of Moray結婚。他於1498年被列為high chancellor of scotland。他去世於1502年1月30日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林享年72歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾坎布斯肯尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland于1430年1月1日出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利时，他的父亲Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly20岁，母亲Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly19岁。他于1455年5月20日与Elizabeth Dunbar 8th Countess of Moray结婚。他于1498年被列为high chancellor of scotland。他去世于1502年1月30日在苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林享年72岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯林史爾坎布斯肯尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland was born on 1 January 1430, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly, was 20 and his mother, Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, was 19. He married Elizabeth Dunbar 8th Countess of Moray on 20 May 1455. In 1498, his occupation is listed as high chancellor of scotland. He died on 30 January 1502, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Cambuskenneth, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland est né le 1 janvier 1430, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Dunbar 8th Countess of Moray le 20 mai 1455. En 1498, sa profession de son indiquée est high chancellor of scotland. Il est décédé le 30 janvier 1502, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Cambuskenneth, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland am 1. Januar 1430 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly 20 und seine Mutter Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly 19. Er hat am 20. Mai 1455 Elizabeth Dunbar 8th Countess of Moray geheiratet. 1498 ist sein Beruf als high chancellor of scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. Januar 1502 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland und wurde in Cambuskenneth, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland è nato il il 1 gennaio 1430 nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Dunbar 8th Countess of Moray il 20 maggio 1455. Nel 1498, la sua occupazione è indicata come high chancellor of scotland. Morì il 30 gennaio 1502, nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Cambuskenneth, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotlandが1430年1月1日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntlyは20歳，母Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntlyは19歳であった。1455年5月20日にElizabeth Dunbar 8th Countess of Morayと結婚した。1498年，職業はhigh chancellor of scotlandと記録されている。彼は1502年1月30日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで72歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアカンブスケネスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland(이)가 1430년 1월 1일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1455년 5월 20일 Elizabeth Dunbar 8th Countess of Moray(와)과 결혼했다. 1498년, 그의 직업은 high chancellor of scotland이었다. 그는 1502년 1월 30일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 캄버스켄스에 묻혔다.

pt.1 January 1430–30 January 1502: 1 de janeiro de 1430–30 de janeiro de 1502
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1430, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Dunbar 8th Countess of Moray em 20 de maio de 1455. Em 1498, sua profissão aparece como high chancellor of scotland. Ele faleceu em 30 de janeiro de 1502, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Cambuskenneth, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland родился 1 января 1430 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Dunbar 8th Countess of Moray 20 мая 1455 г. В 1498 году он работал по профессии high chancellor of scotland. Он умер 30 января 1502 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности камбускеннет, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

sm.from 1498 to 1501: mai le 1498 e o'o I le 1501

es.1 January 1430–30 January 1502: 1 de enero de 1430–30 de enero de 1502
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir George Gordon 2nd Earl of Huntly -  High Chancellor of Scotland nació el 1 de enero de 1430, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Dunbar 8th Countess of Moray el 20 de mayo de 1455. En 1498, su ocupación registrada era high chancellor of scotland. Murió el 30 de enero de 1502, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Cambuskenneth, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
